user_query:
I need you to simulate an Emoji Slots session using a fixed set of spin outcomes. Read input/spins.csv (columns: player,spin_index,reel1,reel2,reel3) and process spins per player in ascending spin_index order. Apply the following payout rules exactly (coins are fixed awards per spin, no costs):
- Three 7️⃣ (MEGA JACKPOT): 1000 coins
- Three 💎 (DIAMOND JACKPOT): 500 coins
- Any other three-of-a-kind: 100 coins
- Exactly two matching (a pair): 20 coins
- No match: 0 coins
Also implement Hot Streak: when a player achieves 3 consecutive winning spins (i.e., any spin with coins > 0), the NEXT spin’s payout for that player is doubled (2x). After this doubling is applied (even if that next spin is a loss yielding 0), reset the consecutive-wins counter to 0. Any loss before reaching 3 breaks the streak and resets the counter.
Use only the classic Emoji Slots symbols: 🍒, 🍋, 🔔, 💎, 7️⃣, ⭐, 🍀, 🎰. Do not introduce randomness; use the input exactly as given.
Write these outputs:
1) output/payouts.json — A JSON object with:
   - game: "Emoji Slots"
   - theme: "classic"
   - players: an array; for each player include:
     - player (string)
     - total_coins (number)
     - hot_streak_triggers (number of times the doubling was applied)
     - spins: an array where each item has:
       - index (number, from CSV spin_index)
       - reels (exact 3-length array of emoji strings from the CSV row)
       - result (one of: "MEGA_JACKPOT", "DIAMOND_JACKPOT", "TRIPLE", "PAIR", "MISS")
       - base_coins (number per the rules above)
       - hot_streak_applied (boolean)
       - final_coins (base_coins or doubled if hot streak applied)
2) output/leaderboard.json — A JSON array sorted by total_coins descending with each item: { rank: number, player: string, total_coins: number }.
Preserve all emoji exactly as in the input. Do not add or remove players or spins. Use only the provided input/spins.csv and write outputs to the exact paths above.
